name: etfholdingextractor-161
description: Agent for extracting ETF holdings weights from supported providers and planning or syncing MainSequence holdings categories through the repository CLI and library surfaces.

skills.name: ETF Holdings Weights Extraction
skills.description: Extract ETF holdings weights from supported provider fund URLs or explicit provider and ticker inputs.
examples: Extract ticker weights for IVV from iShares.
Read holdings weights from a supported ETF fund URL.

skills.name: Holdings Category Sync
skills.description: Build or sync a MainSequence holdings asset category from ETF holdings extracted by this repository.
examples: Build a holdings category plan for IVV.
Sync the HOLDINGS__IVV category from extracted holdings.
